title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 10 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 10 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 10 2026
summary:
Main
The DCE iron ore market was slightly stronger in the morning session and rallied at the close today. The most-traded I2609contract seƩled at 771.5 yuan/mt, up 1.51% from the previous trading day. Port spot prices rose by 5-10 yuan/mt from the day before.
